Bus Timings

Bus C9 Timings Al Qiyadah Metro to Satwa Bus Station

November 5, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Alright, let me fill you in on Bus C9 in Dubai - it’s a real lifesaver. This route hooks you up from Al Qiyadah Metro all the way to Satwa Bus Station, hitting up a bunch of neighborhoods and cool spots along the way. Whether you’re heading to the office or checking out some local hotspots, this bus has got your back.

The best part? These buses are always rolling through, so you’re not left hanging around forever. Seriously, if you’re trying to navigate Dubai without the usual headaches, Bus C9 is your ticket to ride. It’s a total no-brainer for getting around town.

Route Name C9
Route Description Al Qiyadah Metro - Satwa Bus Station · 13
Total Distance Approximately 15 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 36 minutes
Operational Hours 06:00 to 23:20 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus C9 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The C9 bus operates with the following schedule:

From Al Qiyadah Metro From Satwa Bus Station
06:00 06:00
06:35 06:35
07:00 07:05
07:30 07:35
07:55 08:05
08:20 08:35

22:20 22:20

23:16 23:20

Bus C9 Timetable

Check the full schedule on the RTA website or access it via this link for Bus C9 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus C9 is generally affordable, with ticket prices typically around AED 3. This makes it an economical choice for daily commuting and for visiting various local attractions.

Bus Booking

Currently, there is no online booking option available for Bus C9. Passengers can purchase tickets directly on the bus or use a Nol Card, which is accepted for all public transportation in Dubai. For added convenience, Nol Cards can also be managed and recharged through the RTA Dubai app.

Bus Route

The C9 bus route includes the following stops:

  1. Al Qiyadah Metro

  2. Dar Al Aman Building

  3. Hor Al Anz East, Terminus

  4. Wuhaida, Road

  5. Khabeesie 20th Street

  6. Dubai Oxygen

  7. Kangaroo Plastics

  8. Gargash Automobiles

  9. Renault Service Center

  10. Port Saeed

  11. Al Bakhit Center

  12. Port Saeed, Masjid

  13. Al Rigga Metro

  14. Ghurair City

  15. Union Metro · 1

  16. Deira, Beniyas Road

  17. Al Sabkha Marine

  18. Emirates NBD

  19. Deira, Old Souq

  20. Al Ras, Public Library

  21. Al Ras Metro

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station External

  2. Department of Ports & Customs

  3. Caltex, Reservoir

  4. Dubai Dry Docks

  5. Executive Court

  6. Mahboubi Clinic

  7. Hudheiba, Road

  8. Satwa Bus Station · 13

Some other Dubai bus routes you can check out are the C15 bus route, which goes from Deira City Center Bus Station to Mamzar Beach Park Terminus, and the 23 bus route, which travels from Oud Metha Bus Station to Al Nahda 1, DEWA, and back.

Bus C9 Station Overview

Al Qiyadah Metro

Al Qiyadah Metro Station is a prominent transit point located on the Dubai Metro’s Red Line, providing essential connectivity to various parts of the city. This station is well-equipped with modern amenities, including ticketing counters, escalators, and sheltered waiting areas.

Its strategic location facilitates easy transfers between the metro and bus services, making it a key hub for commuters traveling through Dubai.

Al Rigga Metro Station A2 Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Rigga Metro Station A2 Bus Stop is a key transit point where Bus Routes C09 and 77 intersect. This stop provides essential connections within the Al Rigga area, facilitating seamless travel between different parts of the city. Its strategic location near the Al Rigga Metro Station enhances accessibility for commuters, offering convenient access to both local and extended destinations.

bu Hail Center 2 Bus Stop Intersection

The Abu Hail Center 2 Bus Stop serves as a crucial intersection for Bus Routes 64, 13B, C09, and C10. This stop connects passengers to various destinations across Dubai, making it a vital hub for commuters in the Abu Hail area. Its proximity to the Abu Hail Center ensures convenient access to shopping, dining, and other services, catering to the needs of both locals and visitors.

Al Ras Metro Bus Stop Intersection

This strategic location provides seamless connectivity for passengers traveling across various parts of the city, making it a vital hub for efficient travel and convenient transfers between different bus services.

Satwa Bus Station · 13

Satwa Bus Station is a major bus terminal located in the vibrant Satwa neighborhood, serving as a central hub for numerous bus routes.

Its location in a busy commercial district ensures high passenger traffic, providing convenient access to local shops, markets, and other amenities. The station’s role in connecting various bus routes and its proximity to key local attractions make it an important part of Dubai’s public transportation network.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The Bus C9 route passes several notable tourist attractions and destinations in Dubai:

  1. Union Metro Station: A key transport hub in Dubai, offering access to various parts of the city.

2.

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station External: Located near the famous Gold Souk, a bustling market known for its wide range of gold jewelry and traditional Arabian goods.

  2. Dubai Dry Docks: An area with historical significance related to Dubai’s maritime industry, showcasing the city’s development over time.

  3. Executive Court: A business district that often hosts international and local events, contributing to Dubai’s vibrant economic scene.

  4. Al Ras Public Library: A cultural and educational site offering resources and events for the local community.

  5. Ghurair City: A popular shopping mall featuring various retail outlets, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

8.

  1. Dubai Oxygen: A commercial and business area with shops and restaurants, reflecting the city’s modern urban development.

Journey Experience

Bus Route C9 from Al Qiyadah Metro to Satwa Bus Station offers a long and scenic journey through some of Dubai’s bustling neighborhoods.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to Satwa Bus Station · 13, the furthest point on the C9 bus route starting from Al Qiyadah Metro. The journey is priced between AED 54 and AED 65, offering a convenient and comfortable option for reaching this major transport hub. This service is ideal for those who prefer a private ride to access the wide range of local connections and amenities available at Satwa Bus Station.

For real-time updates on bus schedules and other public transport information, you can use the RTA Dubai app, which provides detailed route and timing information. The app also features live tracking of buses, allowing passengers to monitor their bus’s location and estimate arrival times accurately. Additionally, it offers notifications for service changes and disruptions, ensuring you stay informed throughout your journey.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 5, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
